source_pr.title: test: fix random "IsolationRead" fails
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
fix #14579 

### What is changed and how it works?
The server-level config of isolation read affects all tests for different test suites. So I make the `testIntegrationSuite` unparallel.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

symptoms: PR title/merge commit says "fix random \"IsolationRead\" fails".
failure_signature: PR title/merge commit says "fix random \"IsolationRead\" fails".
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to leaked global/shared state between tests. This PR stabilizes it by: test: fix random "IsolationRead" fails.

evidence: evidence: PR title/merge commit says "fix random \"IsolationRead\" fails".
evidence: PR body: "The server-level config of isolation read affects all tests for different test suites"; makes testIntegrationSuite not parallel.

evidence: diff narrows global config side-effect window: set config.GetGlobalConfig().IsolationRead.Engines = []string{"tiflash"} then resets to []string{"tikv", "tiflash", "tidb"} immediately after tk.Exec (planner/core/integration_test.go).
